title: Superhero Job Application
text:
**Origin story:**
I was bitten by a radioactive
. At first I only gained the power to
, but after a thunderstorm and a motivational speech from my grandmother, I learned to
at incredible speed. My weakness is

, especially on Mondays.

**Equipment checklist:**
- Utility belt containing snacks, string, and a small

- Mask with anti-fog goggles and excellent cheekbones

who complains constantly but never gives up

**Battle record:**
Last week I defeated the villain known as Doctor

, and a perfectly timed pun. Civilians cheered, pigeons saluted, and one reporter asked if I was single in the middle of a collapsing bridge.

**Statement of purpose:**
I wish to protect this city because every child deserves to feel safe, every dog deserves a long walk, and every villain deserves a second chance unless they steal cakes. I promise to arrive quickly, leave politely, and never reveal my identity at family reunions.
